forbidden_patterns.reason: No dollar figures or currency amounts.
No fixed call, dial, or numeric KPI quota.
No fixed promotion, ramp, or advancement timeline.

forbidden_patterns.pattern: \b(?:base pay|base rate|ramp-up base|performance pay|milestone bonus(?:es)?|bonus(?:es)? (?:for|milestones?)|commission on|earning potential|earnings can grow|higher earnings?|earn the most|strong months show up in your paycheck|the more you make|money (?:you are|you're) putting in your own pocket|compensation (?:is|will be) tied to)\b|\byou (?:will|can|may) (?:earn|receive|get paid)\b
forbidden_patterns.reason: No fixed pay structure or compensation promise.

forbidden_patterns.pattern: \b(?:you (?:will|can) (?:move up|advance|get promoted)|first (?:one|ones|people) considered|there(?:'s| is) a real path here|promotion schedule|role ladder|management path|at the next level)\b
forbidden_patterns.reason: No guaranteed role ladder, promotion, or first-consideration claim.

forbidden_patterns.pattern: \b(?:lead sourcing specialist|lead sourcing seat|acquisition manager|acquisitions manager|follow-up specialist|setter|closer|sales manager|team lead)\b
\b(?:first half hour|last half hour|full hours|days? a week|fixed calling block)\b|\b(?:\d+|one|two|three|four|five|six|seven|eight|nine|ten|fifteen|thirty)\s*(?:minutes?|hours?)\b
forbidden_patterns.reason: The current role sheet, schedule, and manager define daily timing.
Videos must not depend on visible chapter numbering.
BMH spoken scripts do not use em dashes.
